content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-14, SecureField) but review_information contains placeholder demo credentials/notes: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewer needs a working demo account and clear instructions to get past your login screen, or the app will be rejected as "unable to review core functionality." Your current review notes are all placeholders ("test"/"changeme"/"TBD"), which is exactly the kind of temporary content Apple flags under 2.1. Please provide a real, active demo account plus notes explaining how to reach any gated features (e.g., paywalls, special flows).
